item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 050400Z AUTO 33004KT 5000 RA BR OVC004/// ///CB 13/13 Q1008 TEMPO 2000 -SHRA BKN008 BKN015TCU
